code: import React,{useEffect,useRef,useState}from'react';import{STRINGS}from"../../constants/strings";import axios from"axios";import{BASE_URL}from"../../constants/base_url";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function NewContact(props){const{userData,newContact,menuOpen}=props;const[inviteCode,setInviteCode]=useState("");const handleInviteCode=event=>{setInviteCode(event.target.value);};const handleInviteContact=async event=>{event.preventDefault();try{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");const response=await axios.post(`${BASE_URL}/invite`,{inviteCode:inviteCode},{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`}});}catch(error){console.log(error);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"newContact-container",hidden:newContact===false,children:userData&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"newContact",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"newContact-title-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"newContact-back-btn",onClick:menuOpen,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"bi bi-arrow-left"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{className:"newContact-title",children:STRINGS[userData.language].NewContact})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("form",{className:"newContactForm",onSubmit:handleInviteContact,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{className:"newContact-search",type:"text",placeholder:STRINGS[userData.language].InvitationCode,value:inviteCode,onChange:handleInviteCode})})]})});}export default NewContact;
